title: Balerion: The Black Dread #got #shorts
description: Balerion was not just a dragon—he was the living shadow of Valyria’s power. The largest, oldest, and most terrifying creature in Westeros history, he reshaped kingdoms with fire. This is the legend of the Black Dread. #Balerion #Targaryen #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: Balerion was not just a dragon—he was the shadow of Valyria itself, reborn in a new world.
scenes.image_prompt: massive black dragon emerging from smoke, wings covering the sky, terrifying scale, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He was the largest dragon ever known, so vast that entire towns vanished beneath his wings.
scenes.image_prompt: Balerion flying over a city, shadow covering everything below, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: His scales were black as night, his flames so hot they could melt stone into flowing rivers.
scenes.image_prompt: Balerion unleashing black fire melting castle walls, molten stone flowing, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He had flown in Valyria before the Doom, carrying its memory into a world that had forgotten.
scenes.image_prompt: Balerion flying above ancient Valyria in flashback, red sky and fire, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: With Aegon upon his back, Balerion became the weapon that forged the Seven Kingdoms into one.
scenes.image_prompt: Aegon riding Balerion over Westeros map, conquest imagery, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Iron Throne itself was created by his fire, melting swords into a symbol of absolute rule.
scenes.image_prompt: Iron Throne forming under dragonfire, glowing molten metal, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Even after conquest, his presence alone was enough to keep kingdoms in fear and submission.
scenes.image_prompt: lords kneeling while Balerion looms behind the throne, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But as time passed, even the Black Dread grew old, his fire dimming with the fading age of dragons.
scenes.image_prompt: older Balerion resting, scars visible, fading power, melancholic tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: When he died, the world did not just lose a dragon—it lost the last living memory of Valyria’s true power.
scenes.image_prompt: Balerion’s massive skull resting in darkness, haunting and legendary, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Balerion was not meant to be replaced—because nothing like him would ever exist again.
scenes.image_prompt: shadow of Balerion fading into darkness across Westeros, cinematic final frame, vertical 1080x1920
